
# Run Fig3_GOMC.Rmd, Fig3_HumGut.Rmd, Fig3_MFD.Rmd and Fig3_MiDAS_Global.Rmd before running this Rmd, as it creates the neccessary dataframes for the figures in this Rmd.
```{r}
create_combined_plot <- function(data, title_text) {
  
  # Transform data
  plot_data <- data %>% 
    mutate(Database = factor(Database, levels=names(myColors))) %>%
    mutate(Category = factor(Category, levels=categories))
  
  ggplot(plot_data, 
         aes(x = Category, y = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs`, fill = Database)) +
    # Main bar (full height) - now with alpha mapped to a label
    geom_col(aes(alpha = "Total BGCs"), 
             position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
    # Filled portion based on completeness percentage - alpha mapped to another label
    geom_rect(
      aes(xmin = as.numeric(factor(Category)) - 0.4, 
          xmax = as.numeric(factor(Category)) + 0.4,
          ymin = 0, 
          ymax = `exoPS BGCs/MAGs` * (`% complete exoPS BGCs`/100),
          group = interaction(Database, MAG_status),
          alpha = "Complete BGCs"),
      position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Genome catalogue", values = myColors, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_alpha_manual(name = "BGC Status", 
                  values = c("Total BGCs" = 0.3, "Complete BGCs" = 1)) +
    ggtitle(title_text) +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("exoPS BGCs/MAGs") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 24, hjust = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.text=element_text(size=20),
      legend.title=element_text(size=24)
    )
}
```

```{r}

epsSMASH_combined <- rbind(
  epsSMASH_GOMC %>% mutate(Database = "Global Ocean Microbiome Catalogue"),
  epsSMASH_MiDAS %>% mutate(Database = "MiDAS Global"),
  epsSMASH_HumGut %>% mutate(Database = "HumGut"),
  epsSMASH_MFD %>% mutate(Database = "Microflora Danica"))


myColors <- brewer.pal(4, "Set2")

names(myColors) <- c(
  "Microflora Danica", "MiDAS Global", "Global Ocean Microbiome Catalogue", "HumGut"
 )
custom_colors <- scale_fill_manual(name = "Database", values = myColors, drop = FALSE)

Fig3A <- create_combined_plot(epsSMASH_combined, "")

ggsave("figures/all/Fig3A.svg", Fig3A, dpi = 300, height = 8, width = 16)
```

```{r}
all_regions <- rbind(
  GOMC_all_regions %>% right_join(GOMC_HumGut_tax_derep_HQ) %>% select(genome_id, product, start, end, region, contig_edge, gtdb_classification) %>% mutate(Database = "Global Ocean Microbiome Catalogue"),
  MiDAS_all_regions %>% right_join(MiDAS_tax_derep_HQ) %>% select(genome_id, product, start, end, region, contig_edge, gtdb_classification) %>% mutate(Database = "MiDAS Global"),
  HumGut_all_regions %>% right_join(HumGut_tax_HQ_derep) %>% select(genome_id, product, start, end, region, contig_edge, gtdb_classification) %>% mutate(Database = "HumGut"),
  MFD_all_regions %>% right_join(MFD_tax_derep_HQ)  %>% select(genome_id, product, start, end, region, contig_edge, gtdb_classification) %>% mutate(Database = "Microflora Danica") 
) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Database, genome_id) %>%
  mutate(BGCs =  ifelse(is.na(product), 0,n()))


all_regions_distinct_genome_id <- all_regions%>% group_by(Database) %>% distinct(genome_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(catalogue_size = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(Database, BGCs) %>%
  mutate(
    p_BGC = n()/catalogue_size*100,
    no_genomes = n()
    ) %>%
  distinct(BGCs, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Database = factor(Database, levels=names(myColors)))



Fig3B <- all_regions_distinct_genome_id %>% ggplot(
  aes(x = BGCs, y = p_BGC, fill = Database)
) + geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_label2(aes(label = no_genomes), fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE, size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~ Database, ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Genome catalogue", values = myColors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, by = 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 50, by = 25)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 55)) +
  ylab("Percentage of MAGs") +
  xlab("BGCs/MAG") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
  strip.background = element_blank(),
  strip.text.x = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 15),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
  legend.position = "none",
  plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
  panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

Fig3B

fwrite(all_regions %>% select(-BGCs) %>% arrange(gtdb_classification) %>% filter(!is.na(product)), "supplemental_data/TableS3.tsv", sep = "\t")

ggsave("figures/all/Fig3B.svg", Fig3B, dpi = 300, height = 10, width  = 10)
```
